CREATE TABLE polygons_table (id UInt32, geom Array(Array(Tuple(Float64, Float64)));
SELECT wkt(polygonsUnionSpherical(geom)) FROM polygons_table WHERE id IN (1, 2);
CREATE TABLE additional_polygons (id UInt32, geom Array(Array(Tuple(Float64, Float64)));
SELECT wkt(polygonsUnionSpherical(a.geom)) FROM polygons_table a JOIN additional_polygons b ON a.id = 1;
SELECT wkt(polygonsUnionSpherical(arrayJoin(geom))) FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 1 GROUP BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM polygons_table WHERE wkt(polygonsUnionSpherical(geom)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT wkt(polygonsUnionSpherical(geom)) FROM (SELECT geom FROM polygons_table WHERE id IN (1, 2) UNION ALL SELECT geom FROM additional_polygons WHERE id = 3);
WITH (SELECT geom FROM polygons_table WHERE id = 1) AS poly1, (SELECT geom FROM additional_polygons WHERE id = 3) AS poly2 SELECT wkt(polygonsUnionSpherical(poly1, poly2));
